author.name: Damian Paszkowski
author.bio: I'm a product-minded full-stack engineer with eight years in TypeScript and React, the last five in web3 and DeFi at protocols like MakerDAO, Summer.fi, and Arrakis. I own features end to end — UX, architecture, and the Solidity underneath — and I've shipped systems and products that generated millions in revenue.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the loop
newsletter.text: Notes on new essays, projects, and experiments — straight to your inbox.
newsletter.successMessage: ✓ Thanks — check your inbox to confirm.
